recommendations.title: Boy Erased
recommendations.overview: Jared, the son of a Baptist pastor in a small American town, is outed to his parents at age 19. Jared is faced with an ultimatum: attend a gay conversion therapy program – or be permanently exiled and shunned by his family, friends, and faith.

recommendations.title: The Family Fang
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister return to their family home in search of their world famous parents who have disappeared.

recommendations.title: Spider
recommendations.overview: A young man tries to make things right again in his relationship after he and his girlfriend get in a fight.

recommendations.title: Felony

recommendations.title: Bad Words
recommendations.overview: Forty-year-old misanthrope, Guy Trilby, enters the National Golden Quill Spelling Bee through a loophole in the rules.

recommendations.title: Gurren Lagann The Movie: Childhood's End
recommendations.overview: Simon and Kamina live in an underground city monitored by the village chief. When Simon stumbles upon an artifact and beastmen invade from the surface, Simon and Kamina rebel against them.
